items.name: Golden Sword of Spring Growth
items.description: Spring is here and gold is best. Best your foes by slashing them or by spawning a deadly field of protective poisonous flowers.  Click to slash and do 30-35 damage per hit. Press 'Q' to  spawn a deadly field of white, blue, gold, and violet flowers around you, preventing your enemies from coming up to you. Anyone that attempts to enter the field of flowers will be massively damaged every second they're in it.
